Headline: #3 King Drive  Temporary Southbound Reroute near King Drive/34th
ShortDescription: Southbound 3 King Drive buses are temporarily rerouted via King Drive, 33rd, Michigan, 35th and King Drive: due to, police activity near King Drive/34th.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Southbound #3 King Drive buses are temporarily rerouted via King Drive, 33rd, Michigan, 35th and King Drive: due to, police activity near King Drive/34th.

Northbound buses are not affected.

Allow extra travel time.
